flipSentences: Creating with code. Small details matter.
profile.about:
- I build Web Applications that actually work
- Skilled in **Next.js**, **React**, **TypeScript**, **Golang**, **tRPC**, and modern full-stack technologies, building production-ready solutions for difference domains.
- Passionate about exploring new technologies and turning ideas into reality through polished, thoughtfully crafted personal projects.

positions.title: Full Stack Developer
positions.description:
- Build an AI-powered video editor from scratch, developing core timeline-based editing workflows and system architecture.
- Develop AI-driven video editing features to automate transitions, scene detection, and smart edits.
- Build and maintain backend services and video processing pipelines for media management and rendering.
- Ensure UI/UX consistency, performance optimization, and scalable full stack solutions across the platform.

positions.title: Frontend Intern
positions.description:
- Working on the timeline filmstrip component for an AI-powered video editor.
- Building intuitive, creator-friendly UI for users with zero video-editing experience.
- Collaborating closely with founders and a small engineering team to ship core product features.
- Implementing responsive and high-performance frontend components across the editor.

positions.title: Full-stack Developer
positions.description:
- Built a booking management website for customs garage.
- Built a real-time dashboard for monitoring server health and website traffic.
- Created an internal tool for a law firm to manage case files and client documents.
- Built a membership management tool for a gym

positions.title: Full Stack Developer
positions.description:
- Designed and developed a responsive website for Midnight Customs with dynamic booking forms and automated email confirmations.
- Built an intuitive, mobile-optimized UI/UX ensuring seamless customer interaction and cross-browser compatibility.
- Collaborated remotely with stakeholders to gather requirements and deliver a fully functional, deployed site on time.
- Improved customer engagement and streamlined appointment handling through integrated digital workflows.
- Ensure UI/UX consistency and adherence to standards.

positions.title: Coding Club - BITS Pilani
positions.description:
- Active contribution to the college coding club through hackathons, workshops, and collaborative web development projects.
- Participation in peer programming, code reviews, and knowledge-sharing sessions to strengthen problem-solving and technical skills.
- Assisted in organizing tech events and coding competitions, fostering a learning-driven community and gaining exposure to emerging technologies.

positions.title: Birla Institute of Technology and Sciences - Pilani
positions.description:
- Currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science.
- Language Proficiency: B1 English Level.
- Achieved several awards, including:
  - Bronze Medal — 10th Design, Manufacturing, and Application Award 2022
  - 2nd Prize — Business Startup Competition 2019

projects.title: Sketchly
projects.description: A minimalist, collaborative whiteboard tool built with React and TypeScript, featuring real-time drawing, shapes, and text. Supports exporting sketches and offline functionality. Designed for simplicity and ease of use, inspired by Excalidraw.

projects.title: Upstack
projects.description: Stop guessing if your APIs are down. Upstack quietly watches your endpoints and alerts you before users notice failures. Get cron-like monitoring without the cron headaches.

projects.title: TruTalk Therapy
projects.description: A clean, comforting mental-health service website built for TruTalk Therapy, designed to help patients easily discover services and book sessions.

projects.title: Midnight Customs
projects.description: A sleek, responsive website for a premium customs garage, showcasing their unique vehicle builds and services.

projects.title: Blink chat
projects.description: A lightweight chat app where messages appear instantly. No lag, no refreshes.

projects.title: YT Downloader
projects.description: A simple web app that lets you download YouTube videos instantly and for free.

projects.title: Link Vault
projects.description: A full-stack web app for saving and categorizing important links, videos, and documents

ossContributions.title: Premium-Only Newsletters Dashboard with Search & Content Architecture
Dependency Cleanup & Security Hardening for Package Management
